# Pull Request

Fleet accepts focused contributions under the project license with DCO sign-off.
Broad or speculative code changes are reviewed conservatively while the project
is small.

## Summary

-

## Checks

- [ ] I kept this change focused.
- [ ] I did not add generated build output, private logs, private screenshots, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] Code commits, if any, include a `Signed-off-by:` line.
- [ ] I updated docs or release notes if behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks, or explained why they were not run.

## Contribution Licensing

- [ ] I understand broad contributions may be reviewed narrowly even when they satisfy the licensing and DCO requirements.
- [ ] I agree to the Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO) and included `Signed-off-by:` on every code commit.
- [ ] I certify that I can license this contribution under the project license.
